sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110066" key="faeqonti/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φᾰεθοντ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φαέθων</etym>) <sense id="n110066.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of Phaethon,</tr_> i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the Sun,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φ. αἴγλη, μαρμαρυγή,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.782</biblScope> </bibl> (Paul. Sil.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.77</biblScope> </bibl> (ld.).</sense> </entryFree>
